title: Idiotic/Dumb Keybinds
description:
This mod will add new keybinds to the game. Trust me, some were dumb, while others were unbelievably smart.

- Note: This mod is only in beta. This means the mod has not yet been completed.
body:
**This mod is the result of MCreator's help. Thanks to MCreator for existing. It makes creating Minecraft mods so much easier.**\
**This mod has multiple supported languages, thanks to Google Translate.**\
**This mod has the cursed tag, thanks to the existence of the dumb keybinds implemented by this mod.**\
**This mod has the utility tag, thanks to the existence of the useful keybinds implemented by this mod.**\
Dumb Keybinds is a mod that adds new keybinds to the game. Some serve no purpose to exist (for example, Auto-Poison), while others are useful (for example, Auto-Heal).
